ResultEvaluationEnum.description: Indicates whether a result was in tolerance

Undefined.description: The evaluation of the result is unknown, for example because it failed

NotOK.description: The result is out of tolerance

NotDecidable.description: The decision is not possible due to measurement uncertainty.

Result.title: ResultDataType
Result.description: Contains fields that were created during the execution of a recipe.

ResultMetaData.title: ResultMetaDataType
ResultMetaData.description: Meta data of a result, describing the result.

ResultId.description: System-wide unique identifier, which is assigned by the system. This ID can be used for fetching exactly this result using the method GetResultById and it is identical to the ResultId of the ResultReadyEventType.  If the system does not manage resultIds, it should always be set to “NA”.

HasTransferableDataOnFile.description: Indicates that additional data for this result can be retrieved by temporary file transfer.  If not provided, it is assumed that no file is available.

IsPartial.description: Indicates whether the result is the partial result of a total result. When not all samples are finished yet the result is 'partial'.  If not provided, it is assumed to be a total result.

IsSimulated.description: Indicates whether the result was created in simulation mode.  Simulation mode implies that the result is only generated for testing purposes and not based on real production data.  If not provided, it is assumed to not be simulated.

ResultState.description: ResultState provides information about the current state of the process or measurement creating a result.  Applications may use negative values for application-specific states. All other values shall only be used as defined in the following:  0 – Undefined initial value  1 – Completed: Processing was carried out completely  2 – Processing: Processing has not been finished yet  3 – Aborted: Processing was stopped at some point before completion  4 – Failed: Processing failed in some way

StepId.description: Identifies the step which produced the result.  Although the system-wide unique JobId would be sufficient to identify the job which the result belongs to, this makes for easier filtering without keeping track of JobIds.  This specification does not define how the stepId is transmitted to the system. Typically, it is provided by the client when starting an execution.

PartId.description: Identifies the part used to produce the result.  Although the system-wide unique JobId would be sufficient to identify the job which the result belongs to, this makes for easier filtering without keeping track of JobIds.  This specification does not define how the partId is transmitted to the system. Typically, it is provided by the client when starting the job.

ExternalRecipeId.description: External ID of the recipe in use which produced the result. The External ID is managed by the environment.  This specification does not define how the externalRecipeId is transmitted to the system. Typically, it is provided by the client.

InternalRecipeId.description: Internal ID of the recipe in use which produced the result. This ID is system-wide unique and it is assigned by the system.

ProductId.description: Identifies the product used to produce the result.  This specification does not define how the externalRecipeId is transmitted to the system. Typically, it is provided by the client.

ExternalConfigurationId.description: External ID of the Configuration in use while the result was produced.  It is managed by the Environment.  This specification does not define how the externalConfigurationId is transmitted to the system. Typically, it is provided by the client.

InternalConfigurationId.description: Internal ID of the Configuration in use while the result was produced. This ID is system-wide unique and it is assigned by the system.

JobId.description: Identifies the job which produced the result.  This ID is system-wide unique and it is assigned by the system.

CreationTime.description: CreationTime indicates the time when the result was created. Creation time on the measurement system (not the receive time of the server).  It is recommended to always provide the creationTime.

ProcessingTimes.title: ProcessingTimesDataType
ProcessingTimes.description: Contains measured times that were generated during the execution of a recipe.

StartTime.description: Contains the time when the system started execution of the recipe.

EndTime.description: Contains the time when the system finished (or stopped/aborted) execution of the recipe.

AcquisitionDuration.description: Time spent by the system acquiring data.

ProcessingDuration.description: Time spent by the system processing data.

ResultUri.description: Path to the actual measured result, managed external to the server.

ResultEvaluation.title: ResultEvaluationEnum
ResultEvaluation.description: The ResultEvaluation indicates whether the result was in tolerance.

ResultEvaluationCode.description: Vendor-specific code describing more details on resultEvaluation.

ResultEvaluationDetails.description: The optional EvaluationDetails provides high level status information in a user-friendly text. This can be left empty for successful operations.

FileFormat.description: The format in which the measurement results are available (e.g. QDAS, CSV, …) using the ResultTransfer Object. If multiple file formats are provided, the GenerateFileForRead of ResultTransfer should contain corresponding transferOptions, to select the file format. This specification does not define those transferOptions.

ResultContent.description: Abstract data type to be subtyped from to hold result data created by the selected recipe.

items.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

RecipeId.title: RecipeIdDataType
RecipeId.description: RecipeId meta data describing this recipe.

Name.description: Human readable name for the recipe.

Id.description: System wide unique id for the file content. (E.g. Hash of file content is possible)

Type.description: The type of the textile testing device for which the recipe is applicable.

Description.description: Description of the recipe.

ModifiedDate.description: The date of the last modification to the recipe file.

Validated.description: Flag that indicates if the recipe was successfully validated on the textile testing device. Null if the validation was not performed.

RecipeContent.description: The content of this recipe as ByteString.

ContentEncoding.description: The encoding of the content. E.g. UTF-8 or ASCII

ResultEvaluationEnum.description: Indicates whether a result was in tolerance

Undefined.description: The evaluation of the result is unknown, for example because it failed

NotOK.description: The result is out of tolerance

NotDecidable.description: The decision is not possible due to measurement uncertainty.

ResultId.description: System-wide unique identifier for the result.

Timeout.description: With this argument the client can give a hint to the server how long it will need access to the result data.  A value > 0 indicates an estimated maximum time for processing the data in milliseconds.   A value = 0 indicates that the client will not need anything besides the data returned by the method call.  A value < 0 indicates that the client cannot give an estimate.  The client cannot rely on the data being available during the indicated time period. The argument is merely a hint allowing the server to optimize its resource management.

ResultHandle.description: The server shall return to each client requesting result data a system-wide unique handle identifying the result set / client combination. This handle should be used by the client to indicate to the server that the result data is no longer needed, allowing the server to optimize its resource handling.  If the instance of ResultManagementType does not support the ReleaseResultHandle Method, the resultHandle should always be set to 0.  If the error is set to a value other than 0, the resultHandle may be set to 0.

ResultContent.description: Abstract data type to be subtyped from to hold result data created by the selected recipe.

items.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Error.description: 0 – OK  Values > 0 are reserved for errors defined by this and future standards.  Values < 0 shall be used for application-specific errors.

Mounted.description: Flag stating if the part is currently mounted or not.

Traceable.description: Flag stating if the part is traceable (e.g. has an id or serial number).

PartId.description: Id or serial number of the part.

MachineReadable.description: Flag stating if the PartId is machine readable.

LastCalibrationDate.description: Date of the last calibration of this part if available.

ModuleType.description: The type of the module. E.g. hardware/software.

IsInstalled.description: Flag that indicates if the module is installed.

TestProcedureId.description: The available test procedures are stored on the testing device and referenced by name (TestProcedureId).

Description.description: Description of the test procedure.

ProcedureReferences.description: An array of references to standards.

IsProcedureLicensed.description: Flag to define the availability on the server.

Mounted.description: Flag stating if the part is currently mounted or not.

Traceable.description: Flag stating if the part is traceable (e.g. has an id or serial number).

PartId.description: Id or serial number of the part.

MachineReadable.description: Flag stating if the PartId is machine readable.

LastCalibrationDate.description: Date of the last calibration of this part if available.

JobId.description: The unique id given to the job by the client (MES)

RecipeId.title: RecipeIdDataType
RecipeId.description: The available recipes are stored on the TTD and are referenced by their id.

Name.description: Human readable name for the recipe.

Id.description: System wide unique id for the file content. (E.g. Hash of file content is possible)

Type.description: The type of the textile testing device for which the recipe is applicable.

Description.description: Description of the recipe.

ModifiedDate.description: The date of the last modification to the recipe file.

Validated.description: Flag that indicates if the recipe was successfully validated on the textile testing device. Null if the validation was not performed.

NumberOfTests.description: This array contains TestNumDataType structures that describe how many tests per procedures have to be performed.

TestProcedureId.description: The name of the test procedure that should be executed.

NumberOfTests.description: The number of tests that have to be performed with this test procedure on one sample.

SampleInfos.description: This array contains SampleInfoDataType structures that hold the information about the samples that have to be tested.

SampleId.description: The unique identifier of a (physical) sample.

NominalLinearDensity.description: The nominal linear density of this sample in tex. It is used for calculating linear density related parameters.

MaterialDensity.description: The material density in g/cm³. It is used for calculating some test results like diameter.

MaterialType.description: The material type information can be used to switch between material dependend handling of material or for reporting.

PositionOnCarrier.description: Position of the sample on the carrier. If there is no carrier an empty String should be provided.

CarrierTypeId.description: Id to identify the creel geometry of the geometry of the fiber container.

CarrierId.description: Id of the fiber container or carrier/creel. For creels represents the number of the creel wagon.

AdditionalInfo.description: A set of key/value pairs to provide additional information for a job.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Scheduled.description: Indicates if a job was scheduled by a remote client(MES).

ModuleType.description: The type of the module. E.g. hardware/software.

IsInstalled.description: Flag that indicates if the module is installed.

RecipeId.title: RecipeIdDataType
RecipeId.description: RecipeId meta data describing this recipe.

Name.description: Human readable name for the recipe.

Id.description: System wide unique id for the file content. (E.g. Hash of file content is possible)

Type.description: The type of the textile testing device for which the recipe is applicable.

Description.description: Description of the recipe.

ModifiedDate.description: The date of the last modification to the recipe file.

Validated.description: Flag that indicates if the recipe was successfully validated on the textile testing device. Null if the validation was not performed.

RecipeContent.description: The content of this recipe as ByteString.

ContentEncoding.description: The encoding of the content. E.g. UTF-8 or ASCII

ResultKey.description: Unique identifier of the measured property defined by the tester application.

ItemCount.description: Number of valid tests that were calculated in the statistics.

MeanValue.description: Mean value of the valid tests.

CoefficientOfVariation.description: Coefficient of variation of valid tests.

MinValue.description: The minimum value of the valid tests.

MaxValue.description: The maximum value of the valid tests.

SampleId.description: The unique identifier of one sample.

TesterJobId.description: TTD internal id given to the tested set of samples(job)

TesterSampleResultId.description: Unique identifier created by the TTD for each sample result. Necessary additional to the SampleId if the sample is tested more than once.

ProductInstanceURI.description: Unique product instance uri of the TTD.

CanBeDeleted.description: Flag set by the client that indicates if the TTD may delete the result.

JobOrder.title: ISA95JobOrderDataType
JobOrder.description: Defines the information needed to schedule and execute a job.

JobOrderID.description: An identification of the Job Order.

Description.description: Addition information about the Job Order The array allows to provide descriptions in different languages.

WorkMasterID.description: Work Master associated with the job order. If multiple work masters are defined, then the execution system can select the work master based on the availability of resources.

items.title: ISA95WorkMasterDataType
items.description: Defines a Work Master ID and the defined parameters for the Work Master.

ID.description: An identification of the Work Master.

Description.description: Additional information and description about the Work Master.

Parameters.description: Defined parameters for the Work Master.

items.title: ISA95ParameterDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines three linked data items: the ID, which is a unique identifier for a property, the value, which is the data that is identified, and an optional description of the parameter.

ID.description: A unique identifier for a parameter

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter. The array allows to provide descriptions in different languages when writing. When accessing, the server shall only provide one entry in the array.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the value

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

StartTime.description: The proposed start time for the order, may be empty if not specified

EndTime.description: The proposed end time for the order, may be empty if not specified

Priority.description: The priority of the job order, may be empty of not specified. Higher numbers have higher priority.  This type allows the Job Order clients to pick their own ranges, and the Job Order server only has to pick the highest number.

JobOrderParameters.description: Key value pair with values, not associated with a resource that is provided as part of the job order, may be empty if not specified.

items.title: ISA95ParameterDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines three linked data items: the ID, which is a unique identifier for a property, the value, which is the data that is identified, and an optional description of the parameter.

ID.description: A unique identifier for a parameter

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter. The array allows to provide descriptions in different languages when writing. When accessing, the server shall only provide one entry in the array.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the value

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

PersonnelRequirements.description: A specification of any personnel requirements associated with the job order, may be empty if not specified

items.title: ISA95PersonnelDataType
items.description: Defines a personnel resource or a person, a quantity, an optional description, and an optional collection of properties.

ID.description: An identification of a Personnel Class or Person.

Description.description: Additional information and description about the resource.

PersonnelUse.description: Information about the expected use of the personnel, see the ISA 95 Part 2 standard for defined values.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the quantity

Properties.description: Any associated properties, or empty if there are no properties defined.

items.title: ISA95PropertyDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines two linked data items: an ID, which is a unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource, and the value, which is the data for the property.

ID.description: Unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the value

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

EquipmentRequirements.description: A specification of any equipment requirements associated with the job order, may be empty if not specified.

items.title: ISA95EquipmentDataType
items.description: Defines an equipment resource or a piece of equipment, a quantity, an optional description, and an optional collection of properties.

ID.description: An identification of an EquipmentClass or Equipment.

Description.description: Additional information and description about the resource.

EquipmentUse.description: Information about the expected use of the equipment, see the ISA 95 Part 2 standard for defined values.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the quantity

Properties.description: Any associated properties, or empty if there are no properties defined.

items.title: ISA95PropertyDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines two linked data items: an ID, which is a unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource, and the value, which is the data for the property.

ID.description: Unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the value

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

PhysicalAssetRequirements.description: A specification of any physical asset requirements associated with the job order, may be empty if not specified.

items.title: ISA95PhysicalAssetDataType
items.description: Defines a physical asset, a quantity, an optional description, and an optional collection of properties.

ID.description: An identification of a Physical Asset Class or Physical Asset.

Description.description: Additional information and description about the resource.

PhysicalAssetUse.description: Information about the expected use of the physical asset, see the ISA 95 Part 2 standard for defined values.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the quantity

Properties.description: Any associated properties, or empty if there are no properties defined.

items.title: ISA95PropertyDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines two linked data items: an ID, which is a unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource, and the value, which is the data for the property.

ID.description: Unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter.

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

MaterialRequirements.description: A specification of any material requirements associated with the job order, may be empty if not specified.

items.title: ISA95MaterialDataType
items.description: Defines a material resource, a quantity, an optional description, and an optional collection of properties.

MaterialClassID.description: An identification of the resource, or null if the Material Class is not used to identify the material.

MaterialDefinitionID.description: An identification of the resource, or null if the Material Definition is not used to identify the material.

MaterialLotID.description: An identification of the resource, or null if the Material Lot is not used to identify the material.

MaterialSublotID.description: An identification of the resource, or null if the Material Sublot is not used to identify the material.

Description.description: Additional information and description about the resource.

MaterialUse.description: Information about the expected use of the material, see the ISA 95 Part 2 standard for defined values.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the quantity

Properties.description: Any associated properties, or empty if there are no properties defined.

items.title: ISA95PropertyDataType
items.description: A subtype of OPC UA Structure that defines two linked data items: an ID, which is a unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource, and the value, which is the data for the property.

ID.description: Unique identifier for a property within the scope of the associated resource

Description.description: An optional description of the parameter.

EngineeringUnits.title: EUInformation
EngineeringUnits.description: The Unit Of Measure of the value

items.description: Stand-in for the infinite remainder of this data structure, which is recursively defined.

TestProcedureId.description: The name of the test procedure that should be executed.

NumberOfTests.description: The number of tests that have to be performed with this test procedure on one sample.

TestProcedureId.description: The available test procedures are stored on the testing device and referenced by name (TestProcedureId).

Description.description: Description of the test procedure.

ProcedureReferences.description: An array of references to standards.

IsProcedureLicensed.description: Flag to define the availability on the server.
